Author: bailey8889
Content: @Tholin From what I understand of the librelane flow, macros information is obtained through the lef for that macro. I was wondering if the lef for the macros that have diodes on both the input and output ports actually contain that information.

Author: tholin
Content: They have ANTENNAGATEAREA and ANTENNADIFFAREA lines on each port

Author: rtimothyedwards_19428
Content: Note the exception that the SRAM macros don't have antenna diodes on any input port.  There is plenty of room to add them.
